info.name: Smart Job Portal API V2
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Smart Job Portal Laravel 12 backend.

Roles: job_seeker | company | admin

Auth: Session-based (cookie). Must set X-XSRF-TOKEN header from the /sanctum/csrf-cookie response before calling login.

Environment Variables:
- base_url  — http://localhost/smart_job/public/api
- token     — (auto-set after login)
- job_id    — (reusable job ID)
- app_id    — (reusable application ID)
- user_id   — (reusable user ID)
- skill_id  — (reusable skill ID)

variable.description: Base URL for the Smart Job Portal API

item.name: 01 - Authentication
item.description: Public and authenticated auth endpoints. Session-based, no bearer token required.

request.description: Register a new user. Role must be 'job_seeker' or 'company'. Password must contain at least one uppercase letter and one number. Email verification is sent after successful registration.

exec: // Secondary assertion for awareness. Main call should be 201.
// To test 422, send an empty body in a separate request.

request.description: Register a new company account.
Attempt registration with invalid data — expects 422 Unprocessable Entity.
Authenticate a verified, non-banned user. Returns the authenticated user object. Session cookie is automatically stored by Postman.
Attempt login with wrong password — expects 401.

query.description: The email verification token sent to the user's inbox

request.description: Verify email using the token sent after registration. Token is a signed, time-limited string.

exec: pm.test('Status is 200 (valid token) or 400 (invalid token)', function () {

request.description: Request a new email verification link. Always returns 200 to prevent user enumeration (even if email doesn't exist).
Request a password reset link to be sent to the given email address.
Reset the user's password using the token received by email.
Returns the currently authenticated user's data. Requires active session. Returns 401 if not authenticated.

exec: pm.test('User object has required fields', function () {

request.description: Logout the current session. Invalidates session and regenerates CSRF token. Must be authenticated.

item.name: 02 - Jobs (Public Browse)
item.description: Public job browsing endpoints accessible to any authenticated and verified user regardless of role.

query.description: Search in job title and description
Filter by type: full_time | part_time | remote | contract

request.description: List all active job posts with optional filters. Supports keyword search (title + description), location, job type, and salary range filters. Returns paginated results (15 per page).

exec: // Auto-save first job ID for subsequent requests

request.description: List all active jobs without any filters.
Get full details of a specific job post including required skills (with mandatory flag) and company profile.

// Test awareness: replace job_id with 99999 to verify 404

request.description: Attempt to fetch a job that doesn't exist — expects 404.

item.name: 03 - Skills (Lookup)
item.description: Skills catalog endpoint — accessible to all authenticated and verified users.

request.description: Returns a flat list of all skills in the catalog. Used for skill selection in profile setup and job posting. No pagination.

exec: pm.test('Response data is an array', function () {
// Auto-save first skill ID for subsequent requests

item.name: 04 - Job Seeker - Profile
item.description: Profile management for job_seeker role. Requires: auth + verified + role:job_seeker.

request.description: Retrieve the authenticated job seeker's profile including their linked skills.

exec: pm.test('403 for company or admin role', function () {
// Test awareness: login as company then call /profile should return 403

body.raw:

}

request.description: Update the authenticated job seeker's profile fields.

exec: pm.test('Response has updated profile data', function () {

item.name: 05 - Job Seeker - CV Management
item.description: CV upload and parsing endpoints for job_seeker role. Rate-limited: cv_upload throttle applies to POST /cv/upload.

request.description: Upload a CV file (PDF or DOCX, max 5MB). Triggers async ParseCVJob on 'cv-parsing' queue. Returns 202 Accepted immediately. Poll /cv/status to check parsing progress.

exec: pm.test('422 on invalid file type or missing file', function () {
// Test awareness: upload a .txt file to verify 422 validation error

request.description: Poll the parsing status of the uploaded CV. Status values: 'pending' | 'processing' | 'done' | 'failed'.
Retrieve the AI-parsed CV data (structured JSON). Returns 404 if not parsed yet.

exec: pm.test('Status is 200 (parsed) or 404 (not yet parsed)', function () {
pm.test('Parsed data has parsed_json field', function () {

request.description: Manually update or correct the AI-parsed CV data. Skills in parsed_json.skills are synced into job_seeker_skills (source=cv). Replaces previous CV-sourced skills.

exec: // Test awareness: send empty body to verify 422

item.name: 06 - Job Seeker - Skills
item.description: Manual skill management for job_seeker role. Skills can also be auto-synced from CV parsing.

request.description: Manually add a skill to the authenticated job seeker's profile (source=manual). Uses firstOrCreate — no duplicates created.

exec: // Test awareness: send skill_id=99999 to get 422

request.description: Remove a skill from the authenticated job seeker's profile by skill ID (path variable).

item.name: 07 - Job Seeker - Recommendations (AI)
item.description: AI-powered job recommendations for job_seeker role. Requires CV to be uploaded first (cv.uploaded middleware).

request.description: Returns up to 20 active jobs ranked by AI match score against the seeker's skill set. Only jobs with score > 0 are returned. Requires CV to be uploaded (403 otherwise). ai_score is appended to each job.

exec: pm.test('Results have ai_score and are sorted descending', function () {

item.name: 08 - Job Seeker - Applications
item.description: Job application management for job_seeker role.

request.description: Apply to a job post. Computes AI match score and missing skills at the time of application. Creates an application status history entry ('applied'). Returns 409 if already applied.
Attempt a duplicate application to the same job — expects 409 Conflict.

exec: pm.test('Duplicate application error message present', function () {

request.description: List all applications submitted by the authenticated job seeker. Includes job post and company profile data. Paginated (15 per page).
Get full details of a specific application including job post and status history. Policy-enforced: seeker can only view own applications.

exec: // Test awareness: access another user's application to get 403

item.name: 09 - Company - Profile
item.description: Company profile management. Requires: auth + verified + role:company. All routes are prefixed with /company.

request.description: Retrieve the authenticated company's profile.

body.raw:
{
  "company_name": "Tech Corp International",
  "industry": "Software Development",
  "company_size": "51-200",
  "website": "https://techcorp.com",
  "description": "We build enterprise-grade software solutions.",
  "location": "San Francisco, CA",
  "founded_year": 2015
}

request.description: Update the authenticated company's profile fields.

formdata.description: Company logo image file (JPG, PNG, etc.)

request.description: Upload a logo image for the company profile.

item.name: 10 - Company - Job Posts
item.description: Company job post (CRUD) management. Requires: auth + verified + role:company. All routes are prefixed with /company.

request.description: List all job posts belonging to the authenticated company. Paginated (15 per page).

exec: pm.test('Each job has required fields', function () {

request.description: Create a new job post. job_type must be one of: full_time | part_time | remote | contract. Minimum one skill required. Skills array must contain valid skill IDs from the skills catalog.
Attempt to create a job with invalid data — expects 422.
Get full details of a specific company job post including required skills. Only the owning company can access this.

exec: pm.test('403 for jobs owned by other company', function () {
// Test awareness: use another company's job_id

request.description: Update an existing job post. Only the owning company can update. Policy-enforced (403 otherwise).

exec: pm.test('Updated job data is returned', function () {

request.description: Toggle a job post's active status (is_active). Inactive jobs are hidden from public browse results.

exec: pm.test('is_active field is a boolean', function () {

request.description: Soft-delete a job post. The record is kept in the database but excluded from queries. Admin can force-delete. Only the owning company can delete.

item.name: 11 - Company - ATS (Applicant Tracking)
item.description: Applicant Tracking System endpoints for company role. Manage and review job applicants. Prefixed with /company.

request.description: List all applicants for a specific job post, ranked by AI match score (ai_score descending). Includes seeker profile and skills. Only the owning company can access.

exec: pm.test('Applicants have AI score and seeker info', function () {
// Test awareness: use a job owned by a different company

request.description: Get full details of a specific application including the seeker's profile and parsed CV data. Only accessible to the company that owns the related job post.

exec: pm.test('Application has seeker profile and CV data', function () {

request.description: Download the raw CV file (PDF/DOCX) of an applicant. File is served from private storage. Returns 404 if file not found.

exec: pm.test('Returns binary or error on 404', function () {
// File download response — don't parse as JSON

request.description: Update the status of an application. Valid statuses: under_review | shortlisted | rejected. Setting 'rejected' triggers async gap analysis and rejection email job. Fires ApplicationStatusChanged event.

exec: pm.test('Returned application has new status', function () {
pm.test('422 on invalid status value', function () {
// Test awareness: send status=hired to get 422

item.name: Update Status - Rejected (Triggers Email & Gap Analysis)

request.description: Reject an applicant. This triggers: (1) GapAnalyzerService to compute missing skills, (2) SendRejectionEmailJob dispatched to queue, (3) ApplicationStatusChanged event fired.
Attempt to set an invalid application status — expects 422.

exec: pm.test('Validation error on status field', function () {

item.name: 12 - Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints. Requires: auth + verified + role:admin. All routes are prefixed with /admin.

request.description: Get platform-wide statistics: total users, new users this week, total jobs, active jobs, total applications, applications this week.

exec: pm.test('Stats has all expected fields', function () {
pm.test('All stat values are integers', function () {
// Test awareness: login as job_seeker and call this to get 403

Toggle the is_banned flag for a user. If currently banned, unbans them; if active, bans them. Banned users cannot login.
